exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
    ap = rec.get("primer_apellido", "").strip().casefold()
    reg = rec.get("region", "").strip().casefold()
    return f"{ap}|{reg}"
print(blocking_key({"primer_apellido": "Quispe", "region": "Lima"}))

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]
def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]
print(clerical_queue(pairs))

exercises.code:
def shared_email(a, b):
    ea, eb = (a or "").strip().casefold(), (b or "").strip().casefold()
    return bool(ea) and ea == eb
print(shared_email("A@X.com", "a@x.com"), "|", shared_email("", "a@x.com"), "|", shared_email("a@x.com", "b@x.com"))

exercises.code:
txs = [("A", "B", 10), ("C", "D", 1), ("B", "A", 5)]
def direct_txs(txs, a, b):
    return [m for x, y, m in txs if (x == a and y == b) or (x == b and y == a)]
print(direct_txs(txs, "A", "B"))
